meta.title: Botole 3D Premium
meta.description: Botole — Drinking Water Bottle. Lightweight, compact, premium matte-black hydration.

hero.sub: The cap is simple without excess details and you can drink from any angle pleasantly, like drinking out of a glass or mug.

scene.bottleAlt: Matte black Botole drinking water bottle with brushed-metal cap
scene.interactive: Interactive 3D model of the Botole bottle. Drag to rotate it.

footer.notePost: lets you hydrate effortlessly. Made of high quality transparent copolyester
